name: Editor Tweaks
description: Uniform editor line geometry (indent mode, aligned indent guides), Thymer's native hover controls tuned (click-to-zoom, custom cursors, collapsed-line cleanups), plus window-chrome toggles (hide macOS traffic lights, hide Thymer's titlebar).
instructions: Open Plugin: Editor Tweaks from the command palette. Indent mode aligns regular text to the bulleted column; guide fixes keep indent guides on one column per depth. Hover a line: click the handle to zoom (⌥-click opens the menu), press-and-hold still grabs for drag. Window Chrome section hides macOS traffic lights (macOS Desktop only) and/or Thymer's titlebar. All behaviors are toggleable.
author: @akaready
